body_excerpt:
Suppose we have an IQueryable<T> myTable:
var myTable = DataContext.GetTable<MyTable>(); // custom DataContext class that returns IQueryable<T>

// this code works:
myTable.Where(t => t.ID == 1).Set(t => t.Name, "One").Update(); // (1)
